headline: The Acruence Active Hedge U.S. Equity ETF (XVOL) to Close
summary: NEW YORK, April 06, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Tidal Investments LLC and Acruence Capital, LLC announce the planned closure and liquidation of The Acruence Active Hedge U.S. Equity ETF (Cboe: XVOL) (the “Fund”). The Fund’s last day of trading is expected to be Thursday, April 16, 2026, and the Fund is expected to liquidate on Monday, April 20, 2026. Shares of the Fund are expected to be delisted from the Cboe BZX Exchange, Inc at the close of regular trading on Thursday, April 16, 2026 (the “Closi

headline: Cboe Global Markets Reports Trading Volume for March 2026
summary: Cboe Global Markets, Inc. (Cboe: CBOE), a leading global markets operator and pioneer in equity derivatives, today reported March trading volume statistics across its global business lines and provided guidance for selected revenue per contract/net revenue capture metrics for the first quarter of 2026.

headline: Liquidation of Virtus WMC International Dividend ETF
summary: NEW YORK, April 06, 2026--Virtus Investment Partners, Inc. today announced the upcoming liquidation of the Virtus WMC International Dividend ETF ("VWID" or the "Fund").
